---
description: 'These instructions apply to all files in the src/ folder and should be followed by all developers working on the application.'
applyTo: 'src/**/*'
---

# Frontend Instructions

When developing the frontend of the application, you must use responsive design principles to ensure that the application is usable on a variety of devices and screen sizes. You must also ensure that your code is well-organized and that it follows best practices for frontend development. You should use modern JavaScript features and frameworks to build the frontend, and you should ensure that your code is properly documented and that it is easy to understand and maintain.

## Tailwind CSS

For styling, you must use Tailwind CSS v4. You must ensure that your styles are consistent and that they follow the design guidelines of the application. You must also ensure that your styles are properly organized and that they are easy to understand and maintain.

## Darkmode

Darkmode must be implemented using Tailwind CSS's dark mode features. You should ensure that your dark mode implementation is consistent and that it follows the design guidelines of the application. You should also ensure that your dark mode implementation is properly organized and that it is easy to understand and maintain.

## URL

The URL of the frontend application should be `https://smart-charging.hooyberghs.eu`. You should ensure that your code is properly configured to work with this URL and that it is properly tested to ensure that it works correctly when deployed to this URL.
